title: Fresh Dungeons
description: A Fresh Animations addon for the Dungeons Style resource pack
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/6v2vo8CL/images/04c263aec429cd13e8a7c14d96b8fd98b4bbb474.png)

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT

 An addon pack for Fresh Animations which adds compatibility with the pack Dungeons Style

Current Features:
-Fixes the eyes not being animated for Iron golems, evokers, vindicators, pillagers, illusioners, and wolves 

-Fixes the endermen's eyes being completely white

-Fixes the mooshrooms not rendering the mushrooms correctly



Requires Fresh Animations: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations

Meant to be used with Dungeons Style: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeons-style
